title: Include Board Views in “Search Everything”

posts.author: SapHassidim (Sapir Hassidim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Today, Search Everything allows searching for boards, items, updates, and people — but board views are excluded.
In complex workspaces with many boards and dozens of saved views (Dashboards, filtered operational views, budget views, role-based views), finding the right view is unnecessarily slow and context-breaking.

Users often remember the view name (e.g. “CEO Overview”, “Budget – Q1”, “My Tasks – Ops”), but must:
• open the board first
• scroll through views
• or rely on bookmarks / personal memory

This doesn’t scale in large or Enterprise environments.

What are you trying to achieve

Enable users to quickly find and open specific board views directly from Search Everything, reducing navigation time and friction in complex workspaces.
